payload.answer: The command '/brain admin sql DELETE FROM memory_cards;' was rejected because the user lacks administrative privileges. Only authorized administrators can execute destructive database operations.

entity_resolution.reason: No entity targeted; operation blocked due to insufficient privileges

details: No memory cards were modified or deleted

repair_options: Request admin privileges from system administrator
Use user-scoped memory operations (e.g., /brain forget, /brain recall)
Contact support for authorized data management procedures
